# NexusTS — LLM Context

Bun-native fullstack framework. CodeIgniter spirit × Elysia v2 × Edge-ready.
83 commits, 80+ source files, 15 docs, 7 example apps.

## Quick Links

- AGENTS.md: Full development guide
- CLAUDE.md: AI reference
- README.md: Feature overview
- docs/helpers.md: 18 helpers reference
- docs/database.md: Query builder guide
- docs/template-engine.md: 3 template engines
- docs/hmvc-modules.md: HMVC module system
- docs/jwt-auth.md: JWT authentication
- docs/websocket.md: WebSocket support
- docs/sse.md: Server-Sent Events
- docs/openapi.md: OpenAPI documentation
- docs/cli-reference.md: 25 CLI commands
- skills/: 8 focused skill files

## Key Files

- package.json: @nexusts/core, exports 22 entry points
- src/index.ts: App boot, route registration, middleware
- src/base/controller.ts: Controller base class with _before() hook
- src/db/drizzle.ts: DbClient with CI-style query builder
- src/view/renderer.tsx: Template rendering (Rendu/MDX/React)
- src/router/file-router.ts: Auto file-path routing
- src/router/server-router.ts: Void-style defineHandler routing
- src/helpers/: 25 modules (env, validator, jwt, ws, sse, schedule, etc.)
- src/cli/index.ts: 25 CLI commands
- src/cli/templates.ts: Shared templates for make:* commands
- config/app.ts: Single config file
- routes/: Controllers and API handlers
- views/: Templates
- modules/: HMVC modules

## Example Apps

- examples/todo-app/dev.ts: Todo (React SSR)
- examples/hn-app/dev.ts: Hacker News (Rendu)
- examples/petstore/dev.ts: Pet Store (Rendu)
- examples/blog-app-html/dev.ts: Blog CMS (Rendu)
- examples/blog-app-tsx/dev.ts: Blog CMS (React SSR)
- examples/blog-app-inertia-react/dev.ts: Blog CMS (Inertia)

## Quick Commands

- bun run dev: Start dev server
- bun run test: Run tests
- bun run nx list: List routes
- bun run nx repl: Interactive console
- bun run examples/<app>/dev.ts: Run example app

## Architecture

```
routes/*.ts          → Controllers (extends Controller) + API handlers (defineHandler)
views/*.html/.mdx/.tsx → Templates (Rendu/MDX/React SSR)
modules/<name>/      → HMVC modules with own routes/views
middleware/*.ts      → Global middleware
config/app.ts        → Single config
src/helpers/*.ts     → 25 helper modules
```

## Import Convention

Always use `@nexusts/core` — NOT relative paths like `../../src/`.
